title: New paper accepted in ACS Nano
content: Our paper on MoS₂/Perovskite heterostructure photodetectors has been accepted for publication in ACS Nano. Congratulations to all co-authors!

title: Welcome new graduate students
content: We welcome two new M.S. students joining the lab this fall semester. Welcome aboard!

title: Best paper award at IEDM
content: Our research team received the best paper award at the International Electron Devices Meeting (IEDM) 2024.
